hardStopBeforeGeneration: worktree base/head source resolves exactly to 5305c84e80a7117c69a2f8048f9f5ca76e051d09
Neutral Master decodes as 640x960 RGBA PNG with alpha
Idle exact eight frame hashes match approval overlay
Move exact eight frame hashes match approval overlay
Idle and Move protected-byte snapshots captured before generation
attackPackageChecks: frame count between 6 and 8 and smallest readable count justified
every frame decodes as 640x960 RGBA PNG with alpha
source-map/provenance traces every frame to exact Neutral Master
alpha bounds measured and no crop
anchor/bounds/support baseline measured; preferred [0.5,0.92] retained unless evidence requires a hard stop/review
root motion is in-place with zero accumulated world travel
releaseCue has exact frameIndex, normalizedTime, and projectile-release semantic meaning
identity continuity: face/head, hood, green hair, pointed ears, large green eyes, bow, costume, palette, scale, lighting
motion reads as bow attack at board scale
no baked projectile, hit VFX, background, enemy, UI
reviewArtifacts: optional Idle -> Attack -> Idle transition diagnostic

readabilityChecks.knownRisk: bench-scale readability is the highest-risk context

transitionChecks: Attack -> Idle recovery pop and anchor/scale continuity
regressionAndRepositoryChecks: run relevant existing validators read-only without modifying them
protected-byte comparison confirms Neutral Master unchanged
protected-byte comparison confirms approved Idle unchanged
protected-byte comparison confirms approved Move unchanged

tooling.numpyPolicy: Install a pinned compatible numpy version only if the chosen Attack generator actually requires numpy; otherwise do not install it. Record installed version if used.
tooling.frameworkPolicy: Do not add a large framework for this package.
